unit.note: full client Vitest suite (190 files); server unchanged (client-only terminal render fix)

e2e.note: real-browser flow spec 94 against isolated single-process stack

design_fidelity.note: no visual/structural UI change; render-correctness fix only

surface_verification.runner: playwright (chromium) vs isolated single-process Hono serving the built SPA + API (temp USERPROFILE, 127.0.0.1:3947)
surface_verification.justification: Real-browser proof the atlas-corruption heal is wired to the LIVE @xterm/addon-webgl: renderer=webgl, 3 canvas layers, atlasRepaints=5 -> the deferred term.clearTextureAtlas() fired on real atlas mutations, and the BOUNDED count (5, not runaway) confirms no clear->re-raster->onAdd feedback loop. Visual elimination of the intermittent, GPU-specific corruption over a long session remains the user's real-device confirmation (spec 94's documented stance).

behaviors.behavior: On onChangeTextureAtlas (the load-bearing option-change / live-theme atlas swap) a DEFERRED term.clearTextureAtlas() clears the render model and heals the wrong-glyph corruption
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'heals via a DEFERRED term.clearTextureAtlas()' (change path, +1 after microtask) + real-browser e2e 94-webgl-atlas-repaint.spec.ts (renderer=webgl, atlasRepaints=5)

behaviors.behavior: On onRemoveTextureAtlasCanvas (atlas repack; defensive — the merge path self-heals via _requestClearModel but we clear anyway) the same deferred heal fires
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'heals via a DEFERRED term.clearTextureAtlas()' (remove path, toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2))

behaviors.behavior: onAddTextureAtlasCanvas is NOT subscribed (append-only; clearing on it would feedback-loop clear->re-raster->overflow->onAdd->clear)
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'change + remove only, NOT add' (onAddTextureAtlasCanvas not called) + e2e 94 atlasRepaints=5 bounded (no runaway loop under real load)

behaviors.behavior: The clear is DEFERRED via microtask, never synchronous inside the event callback (re-entrancy safety: onRemove fires mid-_mergePages)
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts asserts clearTextureAtlas NOT called before flushMicrotasks(), called after

behaviors.behavior: A burst of atlas mutations in one tick coalesces into a single clearTextureAtlas (idempotent global heal)
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'coalesces a burst ... into a single clear' (3 events -> 1 clear)

behaviors.behavior: Disposing the xterm handle cancels a still-pending heal (no clearTextureAtlas on a torn-down terminal; disposed flag set before term.dispose())
behaviors.evidence: xtermAddons.atlas.test.ts 'disposing the handle cancels a subsequent heal'

behaviors.behavior: A mid-dispose term throw inside the deferred flush is swallowed (no unhandled rejection)

enumeration_basis.note: BUG fix: 'acs' = enumerated fix-behaviors (root-cause heal + 6 safety invariants), each pinned by a unit assertion; the live-WebGL wiring additionally proven by e2e 94
